name: XFPM (XyPriss Fast Package Manager)
description: The Fast Package Manager for the XyPriss ecosystem.
warning: CRITICAL: Public modifications to this file are strictly forbidden. Internal Nehonix metadata ONLY.
message: CLI: Introducing the new 'xfpm serve' command, a modern, lightweight, frictionless local file server with recursive search, folder navigation, and a built-in media viewer. Stay synced and explore your projects with a professional UI right from your terminal.
